description: Defines Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) related to 'Defect' in the backend API, including response, creation, and update request structures with validation annotations.

classes.name: DefectResponse
classes.description: A record representing the data sent in defect-related API responses, with a 'from' method to convert a Defect domain object.

classes.name: IdName
classes.description: A simple record pairing an ID with a name, used in defect reports for reportedBy and assignedTo.

classes.name: CreateDefectRequest
classes.description: A record for creating new defect entries, including validation annotations and relevant fields.

classes.name: UpdateDefectRequest
classes.description: A record for updating existing defects, similar to create request with additional validation.

methods.name: DefectResponse.from
methods.description: Static method to create a DefectResponse DTO from a Defect domain object.
